title: stegostyla cucullata
intro: Stegostyla cucullata, also known as the elephant ear tree, is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines, characterized by its large, heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Stegostyla cucullata have been traditionally utilized in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Stegostyla cucullata can be made into a decoction or infusion, often consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
